text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, December 01. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, The smart-home hub is acting up today. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Home maintenance is a constant cycle. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Good planning. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. I've adjusted the local settings. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Healthy choices are great. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning a street block party soon. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Great progress. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping school lunches for the week. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Let's organize the menu. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: We got invited to a neighbor's house. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Social breaks are great. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
